
# PCA Diagnostics {#sec-pca-diagnostics}

The following table summarises the variance explained by PC1 in each PCA run:

```{r}
#| label: setup-pca-diagnostics
#| include: false
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(DT)

source("../code/00a_impt_data_handle.R")

pca_var <- impt_read("impt/pca_scores/PCA_Variance_Table.csv")

pca_cors <- impt_read("impt/pca_scores/PCA_Variance_and_Correlations.csv")
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-pca-summary
#| tbl-cap: "PCA diagnostics — variance explained by PC1 (generated from [`05_IMPTcalculator.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/05_IMPTcalculator.R) outputs)"
# Top 5 variables per dimension = highest |correlation| with PC1
top_vars <- pca_cors |>
    dplyr::group_by(Dimension_Mode) |>
    dplyr::slice_max(abs(Correlation_PC1), n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) |>
    dplyr::select(Dimension_Mode, Top_Variable = Variable, Correlation_PC1)

pca_summary <- pca_var |>
    dplyr::left_join(top_vars, by = "Dimension_Mode") |>
    tidyr::separate(Dimension_Mode, into = c("Dimension", "Mode"), sep = "_") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
        PC1_Variance_Percent = round(PC1_Variance_Percent, 1),
        Correlation_PC1 = round(Correlation_PC1, 2),
        Mode = dplyr::recode(Mode,
            "all"  = "All",
            "car"  = "Car",
            "pt"   = "PT",
            "bike" = "Bike",
            "walk" = "Walk"
        ),
        Dimension = as.factor(Dimension),
        Mode = as.factor(Mode)
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(Dimension, Mode, `PC1 Var (%)` = PC1_Variance_Percent, `Variable` = Top_Variable, `r with PC1` = Correlation_PC1)

datatable(pca_summary,
    filter = "top",
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(
        paging = FALSE,
        dom = "tif",
        autoWidth = TRUE,
        columnDefs = list(list(className = "dt-center", targets = "_all"))
    )
)
```

::: {.callout-tip}
Table data are read automatically from `/impt/pca_scores/PCA_Variance_Table.csv` and `PCA_Variance_and_Correlations.csv`, which are generated by [`05_IMPTcalculator.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/05_IMPTcalculator.R). Re-run that script to refresh the values after any changes to the input data.
:::
